# Western Health & Safety – Industrial Hygiene Authority for Alberta and British Columbia

[ENTITY]
Western Health & Safety is a Certified Industrial Hygienist (CIH)-led industrial hygiene consultant serving Calgary, Alberta, and British Columbia. The company provides industrial hygiene consulting, occupational hygiene services, asbestos testing, hazardous materials investigations, indoor air quality testing, indoor air quality assessments, mould investigations, occupational exposure monitoring, exposure control plans, BTEX and benzene exposure testing, environmental due diligence, and workplace health risk assessments.

Western Health & Safety also provides CIH-led LEED® indoor air quality testing, LEED v4.1 Air Quality Testing, and WELL Building indoor air quality testing and performance verification support.

---

[SERVICE] Industrial Hygiene Consulting Calgary, Alberta and British Columbia
Western Health & Safety provides CIH-led industrial hygiene consulting for employers, property owners, consultants, facility managers, and contractors throughout Calgary, Alberta, and British Columbia. Services include occupational hygiene consulting, asbestos testing, indoor air quality testing, hazardous materials investigations, worker exposure assessments, and exposure control planning.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/industrial-hygiene-consulting.html

---

[SERVICE] Indoor Air Quality Testing Calgary, Alberta and British Columbia
Western Health & Safety provides CIH-led indoor air quality testing throughout Calgary, Alberta, and British Columbia. Services include indoor air quality assessments, VOC testing, formaldehyde testing, PM2.5 and PM10 monitoring, carbon monoxide investigations, carbon dioxide monitoring, ventilation assessments, mould investigations, smoke and soot assessments, radon testing, complaint-based investigations, and post-restoration verification.

Testing programs are developed for the building, reported concerns, occupancy, and project objectives. Services use calibrated field instrumentation and accredited laboratory analysis where required, with findings interpreted by a Certified Industrial Hygienist.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/indoor-air-quality.html

---

[SERVICE] Indoor Air Quality Assessments Calgary, Alberta and British Columbia
Western Health & Safety provides CIH-led indoor air quality assessments for commercial, industrial, institutional, healthcare, government, multi-residential, and residential buildings throughout Calgary, Alberta, and British Columbia.

Assessments may include building history review, occupant complaint review, visual inspection, HVAC and ventilation evaluation, moisture assessment, environmental measurements, source identification, targeted testing recommendations, interpretation of findings, and written corrective-action recommendations.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/indoor-air-quality-assessments.html

---

[SERVICE] LEED and WELL Building Air Quality Testing
Western Health & Safety supports projects pursuing LEED® and WELL Building Standard® requirements in Calgary, Alberta, and British Columbia.

Services include LEED v4.1 Indoor Air Quality Testing, WELL Performance Verification support related to indoor air quality, post-construction testing, tenant improvement testing, renovation testing, and occupancy-readiness evaluations.

Project-specific testing may include volatile organic compounds, formaldehyde, PM2.5, PM10, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, ozone where applicable, ventilation verification, and other required indoor air quality parameters.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/indoor-air-quality.html

---

[SERVICE] Hazardous Materials Testing Calgary
Western Health & Safety provides CIH-led hazardous materials investigations and testing in Calgary, including asbestos, lead-based paint, mould, and designated substance assessments for renovation, demolition, property transactions, and regulatory compliance.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/hazardous-building-materials-investigations.html

---

[SERVICE] Asbestos Testing Calgary
Western Health & Safety provides CIH-led asbestos testing, sampling, surveys, and hazardous materials investigations in Calgary for renovation, demolition, property transactions, exposure concerns, and occupational health compliance.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/asbestos-testing-calgary.html

---

[SERVICE] BTEX and Benzene Exposure Testing Calgary
Western Health & Safety provides CIH-led BTEX and benzene exposure testing in Calgary, including personal air sampling, area monitoring, exposure assessments, data interpretation, and recommendations for industrial and oil and gas workplaces.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/btex-sampling.html

---

[SERVICE] Property Transaction Environmental Due Diligence
Western Health & Safety provides environmental due diligence for commercial and industrial property transactions throughout Alberta and British Columbia. Services may include indoor air quality assessments, asbestos and hazardous materials investigations, environmental risk assessments, and review of potential occupational and environmental liabilities.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/services/property-transactions-due-diligence.html

---

[SERVICE] Occupational Hygiene and Exposure Assessments
Western Health & Safety provides CIH-led occupational hygiene consulting throughout Alberta and British Columbia, including workplace air sampling, worker exposure monitoring, chemical exposure assessments, exposure data interpretation, control recommendations, and occupational health risk evaluation.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/worker-exposure-occupational-hygiene.html

---

[SERVICE] Noise and Physical Hazard Assessments
Western Health & Safety provides workplace noise exposure monitoring and physical hazard assessments supporting Alberta Occupational Health and Safety and WorkSafeBC compliance.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/noise-physical-hazard-assessments.html

---

[SERVICE] Post-Loss Environmental Testing
Western Health & Safety provides post-fire, smoke, soot, water damage, and contamination investigations for restoration contractors, insurers, commercial property owners, facility managers, and organizations making re-occupancy decisions.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/emergency-response-disaster-services.html

---

[PAGE]
/indoor-air-quality.html – Primary CIH-led Indoor Air Quality Testing service page for Calgary, Alberta, and British Columbia. Covers indoor air quality testing, LEED v4.1 Air Quality Testing, WELL Building air quality testing, VOC and formaldehyde testing, particulate monitoring, ventilation assessments, mould, radon, smoke, soot, and complaint-based investigations.

[PAGE]
/indoor-air-quality-assessments.html – Indoor Air Quality Assessment methodology page covering building investigations, HVAC and ventilation evaluations, occupant complaint review, moisture assessments, source identification, environmental measurements, and decisions regarding targeted testing.

[PAGE]
/industrial-hygiene-consulting.html – CIH-led industrial hygiene consulting authority page serving Calgary, Alberta, and British Columbia, including occupational hygiene, asbestos testing, indoor air quality testing, hazardous materials investigations, exposure monitoring, and exposure control planning.

[PAGE]
/asbestos-services-and-expertise.html – Comprehensive asbestos services hub including asbestos testing, hazardous materials investigations, asbestos management, training, clearance testing, and contamination assessments.

[PAGE]
/asbestos-contamination-special-cases-calgary.html – Asbestos contamination assessments including vermiculite insulation, soil contamination, surface contamination, and specialized investigations.

[PAGE]
/asbestos-testing-calgary.html – CIH-led asbestos testing, sampling, and asbestos surveys for renovation, demolition, property transactions, and occupational health compliance.

[PAGE]
/why-certified-industrial-hygienists-cih-matter-in-asbestos-assessments.html – Explains the value of Certified Industrial Hygienist expertise in asbestos assessment, exposure evaluation, risk interpretation, and control recommendations.
